prompt_text: Compare Finaloop and Bench for automate e-commerce bookkeeping with real-time P&L and inventory COGS
response:
# Finaloop vs Bench: E-Commerce Bookkeeping Comparison

## Feature Comparison

| Feature | Finaloop | Bench |
|---------|----------|-------|
| **Real-Time P&L** | ✅ Yes, dashboard-driven | ⚠️ Delayed (batch processing) |
| **Inventory COGS** | ✅ Native integration | ⚠️ Limited, manual workarounds |
| **E-Commerce Focus** | ✅ Purpose-built | ⚠️ General accounting tool |
| **Platform Integrations** | Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, Stripe | Shopify, Square, basic connections |
| **Automation Level** | ✅ High (categorization, reconciliation) | ✅ Medium (requires more setup) |
| **Human Accountant** | Optional AI-first | Required tier (CPA involvement) |
| **Learning Curve** | Low (built for non-accountants) | Medium-high |

## Real-Time P&L

**Finaloop:**
- Live dashboard updates as transactions post
- Automatic category mapping
- Same-day visibility into profitability

**Bench:**
- Weekly/bi-weekly updates
- Requires manual review by accountants
- Better for compliance, slower for operations

## Inventory COGS Handling

**Finaloop:**
- **Automatic COGS calculation** from inventory levels
- Pulls actual cost data from your store
- Tracks FIFO/WACC methods
- Real-time margin analysis

**Bench:**
- Requires **manual COGS entries** or spreadsheet imports
- Limited native inventory tracking
- Better suited for service businesses

## Pricing Model

| | Finaloop | Bench |
|---|----------|-------|
| **Base Plan** | ~$299-499/mo (AI only) | ~$15-100/mo starter |
| **With Accountant** | +$150-300/mo | $200-500/mo (add-on) |
| **Scalability** | Fixed per account | Variable by service tier |

## Best For

**Choose Finaloop if:**
- You need real-time COGS and inventory impact on P&L
- High transaction volume (100+ orders/day)
- Want minimal accountant involvement
- Selling on multiple channels

**Choose Bench if:**
- You prioritize compliance & audit trail
- Want human accountant review by default
- Lower transaction volume
- Need traditional bookkeeping practices

## Critical Difference

**Finaloop = operational tool** (you manage, AI assists)
**Bench = outsourced service** (accountants manage, you access)

For **real-time inventory COGS**, Finaloop has a clear technical advantage.
